conversations.content: For repositories owned by me, remove my stars if they have also been starred by other users.

<function_thought>

Once I have the user's information, particularly the repositories that they own, I can check which of these repositories have been starred by other users. After identifying those repositories, I will then proceed to unstar them. 
</function_thought>

<function_call>[get_logged_in_github_user_information()]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>

- **Starred repositories**: `file_compression`
